title: Viners Barware Gold Double Wall Ice Bucket, 1.5 L
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our double wall ice bucket is indispensable for any entertainer at home. Keep your ice cold and insulated in this stylish ice container, ready to serve drinks on any occasion.

DOUBLE WALLED | This ice bucket with an insulating layer is designed to keep your ice cubes colder for hours. Fill it up with ice, use the detachable fold away carry handle to place it at your table and close the lid until you are ready to serve.

STRENGTH & DURABILITY | Made from fine quality steel, our 1.5 litre ice bucket is strong, corrosive resistant and has a gold colour finish. Hand washing only and avoid abrasive sponges. Wash before first use.

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage to cocktail shakers, stirrers, and wine buckets.

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from the finest materials.

Finished in high quality stainless steel, this bucket will add style and elegance to your barware collection. Keep wine chilled for longer with this double wall insulated stainless steel cooler. Finished with a satin brush effect on the exterior and polished mirror on the interior. Keep wine chilled for longer with this double wall insulated stainless steel cooler. Finished with a satin brush effect on the exterior and polished mirror on the interior. Store and serve your favourite champagne or sparkling wine from this large capacity ice bucket. Highly effective in keeping wines cold and suitable for all bottle shapes. This silicone ice mould will create 4 (4.5cm/ 13/4”) perfectly sphere shapes. Large pieces of ice melt slower, allowing your drinks to stay cooler without diluting. Ideal for Whiskey, Bourbon and Scotch. Deluxe brushed stainless steel ice serving tongs, with ridged edges for a secure grip on ice cubes or fruit.
